sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30985" key="ei)kosa/stegos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκοσά-στεγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having twenty stories</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:12:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
